name: FindAccountInfo
description: Customer needs to find or retrieve a specific piece of account information — such as their account number, customer reference, area code, or Virgin Media ID. They know what they need but don't know where to find it or have forgotten it. This is not about changing account details or resetting login credentials.

sampleUtterances.utterance: Where can I find my {accountInfoType} ?
What's my {accountInfoType} ?
I need my {accountInfoType}
Can you tell me my {accountInfoType} ?
I've forgotten my {accountInfoType} — can you help?

find my {accountInfoType}
